title: document available secret drivers
body:
Closes #18387

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

Yes (minor text changes in `./bin/podman secret create --help` and `man podman-secret-create`, so release note may not be required after all)

comments.body: @vrothberg Sorry, looks like I mangled the PR during amend. Do you want me to start a new one perhaps?

> @vrothberg Sorry, looks like I mangled the PR during amend. Do you want me to start a new one perhaps?

No worries at all.  You can also reset your local branch and then use `push --force` overwrite the current PR.

LGTM, but DCO and Validate are failing. It looks like your sign-off line doesn't match the author/email of the commit, so I'd either update the sign-off to match the author/email, or vice versa. You also need a [NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] in the  commit message. 

Thanks @christian-2 !
@ashley-cui Thanks, I've done another `git push --force` to accommodate these changes. (I'll get the hang of it eventually ;)
